title: My (Passive) iPhone Experience
content:
News

Feeds (and Blogs)

Podcasts

Videocasts

Flickr

Twittr

... iPhones are everywhere. So far almost everyone are pleased with the phone, but not _the service provider_. Someone even made a threat to return the phone because of the activation process or the service agreement. I haven't heard about anyone who wants to return the phone because of the phone itself. I guess this is a product that _**works as advertised**_.

(That's my "passive" iPhone experience.)

Okay, I promise I'll stop talking about iPhone **for now**.

I'll talk about it again **when** I get it. :D

Speed up, please, Apple.
